workbench.task_fork_guidance: Choose a project workspace on another device. The fork will continue on that target device.
workbench.task_fork_local_path_cloud_disabled: Local folders cannot be copied to a cloud device
workbench.task_fork_stop_notice: This task is running. The current response will be stopped before copying.
workbench.archive_runtime_task_dirty_worktree_forc: Force archiving will delete this worktree directory. Uncommitted changes cannot be recovered.
workbench.archive_runtime_tasks_dirty_worktree_for: Force archiving will delete the worktree directories for these conversations. Uncommitted changes cannot be recovered.
workbench.archive_runtime_task_check_failed: Failed to check worktree changes before archiving
workbench.archive_runtime_task_remove_failed: Task archived, but failed to remove the worktree
workbench.archive_runtime_task_remove_failed_detai: Task archived, but failed to remove the worktree: {{message}}
workbench.runtime_task_close_confirm_description: Exiting the app will interrupt the running task. Exit anyway?
workbench.close_to_tray_hint_title: Wework will keep running in the background
workbench.close_to_tray_hint_description: After you close the main window, running tasks continue in the background. Double-click the system tray icon to reopen Wework, or quit from the tray menu.
workbench.rename_chat_description: Keep it short and easy to recognize
workbench.workspace_file_truncated: File is large; showing the first 256 KiB
workbench.project_create_description: Create a project workspace for multiple conversations under the same project
workbench.project_no_available_devices_hint: Creating a project requires an available device.
workbench.project_chat_device_unavailable: Device {{status}}, cannot start a project chat: {{device}}
workbench.standalone_chat_device_unavailable: No online device available. Cannot start a new chat
workbench.conversation_device_unavailable: {{device}} is {{status}}. Continue when it is online again
workbench.conversation_device_upgrade_required: {{device}} version is below {{version}}. Upgrade to continue
workbench.conversation_device_missing: Connect or upgrade a device first
workbench.device_status_no_devices: Connect a device to use Wework
workbench.device_status_active_upgrade_required: {{device}} version is below {{version}}. Upgrade to continue
workbench.device_status_active_upgrade_waiting: {{device}} is {{reason}}. Upgrade to {{version}} when it is online and idle
workbench.device_status_active_offline: {{device}} is offline. Continue when it is online again
workbench.device_status_active_busy: {{device}} is running a task. Continue when it is idle
workbench.device_status_active_unavailable: {{device}} is unavailable. Continue when it recovers
workbench.device_status_no_online_device: No online device is available. Continue when a device is online
workbench.device_status_upgrade_required: Device version must be upgraded to {{version}} or later
workbench.device_status_upgrade_required_device: {{device}} version is below {{version}}. Upgrade to continue
workbench.device_status_upgrade_required_devices: {{count}} devices are below version {{version}}. Upgrade them to continue
workbench.device_status_upgrade_waiting: {{device}} is {{reason}}. Upgrade to {{version}} when it is online and idle
workbench.project_directory_upgrade_device_hint: Upgrade the current device before choosing a directory
workbench.project_directory_unavailable_device_hin: Choose a directory when the device is online again
workbench.blank_project_name_desc: Keep it short and easy to recognize
workbench.use_existing_folder_desc: Choose a folder on the local device.
workbench.add_remote_project_desc: Choose a connected remote host and select this project's folder.
workbench.cloud_work_desc: Choose the directory that contains the project code. Future tasks run on the selected cloud device.
workbench.cloud_work_connect_desc: No cloud device is available yet. Run a connection script below on a cloud host or another computer.
workbench.add_cloud_device_desc: Run a connection script on the cloud host or host machine you want to add. Refresh devices here after it starts.
workbench.remote_device_startup_desc: Run a script on a cloud host or another computer to add it as a cloud device. Refresh devices after it starts.
workbench.remote_device_startup_docker_desc: Recommended. Starts the cloud device connector in a container, suited for cloud hosts or remote servers.
workbench.remote_device_startup_process_desc: For remote machines that are not using containers. Starts the cloud device connector directly on the host.
workbench.cloud_connection_relogin_required: Cloud login has expired. Please log in again.
workbench.cloud_connection_description: After authorization, server models, cloud devices, and cloud Codex auth sync are added to the workbench.
workbench.cloud_connection_backend_hint: Enter the backend root URL or /api URL. Wework will normalize the connection settings automatically.
workbench.no_remote_project_device: No available remote or cloud device
workbench.project_choose_folder_desc: Choose or create a folder for this device. The project name uses the folder name by default.
workbench.project_edit_folder_desc: Choose or adjust the folder linked to this project on each device.
workbench.project_directory_empty: No subdirectories in the current directory
workbench.remote_project_directory_note: This remote folder will appear as a separate project in the sidebar.
workbench.project_git_token_missing: Please configure a Git token in Settings first
workbench.project_git_clone_progress: Cloning repository. This may take a moment
workbench.app_update_endpoint_missing: Automatic update checks are not available in this build

explore.label: Explore and understand code
explore.implementation_prompt: Explore implementation options for a feature

build.label: Build a feature, app, or tool

review.label: Review code and suggest changes
review.changes_prompt: Review my changes and suggest improvements
review.coverage_prompt: Review test coverage and add missing tests

workbench.continue_im_empty_guide: No private chats are available. Enable an IM channel in Wegent, then send /bind in that IM private chat to bind a session.
workbench.away_im_reminder_description: All task progress will be pushed to IM without changing any task's IM session ownership.
workbench.global_im_notifications_unavailable: IM push is unavailable. Re-login or check the configuration.
workbench.global_im_notifications_requires_cloud_l: Log in to cloud to turn on away reminders
workbench.code_comment_fallback: Please continue based on the attached comments.
workbench.compact_context_hint: Compress the long conversation into shorter context.
workbench.runtime_task_running_message: The current response is still running. Try again after it finishes.
workbench.model_disabled_runtime_family_mismatch: Incompatible with the current model protocol
workbench.environment_review_device_unavailable: The device is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
workbench.browser_empty_desc: Enter a URL to open a page
workbench.browser_invalid_url: Enter a valid http or https URL
workbench.browser_open_failed: Unable to open the in-app browser
workbench.project_ide_cloud_only_tooltip: Project IDE is only available for cloud devices
workbench.local_device_limited_tools_title: No terminal is available for this workspace
workbench.local_device_limited_tools_desc: Check the local project path, execution mode, or device connection.
workbench.empty_conversation_description: Ask a question, paste context, or add attachments below. WeWork responses will appear here.
workbench.plan_mode_description: Ask clarifying questions before continuing when needed.
workbench.pursue_goal_description: Set a goal for WeWork to keep working toward
workbench.goal_input_placeholder: What direction should WeWork work toward?
workbench.runtime_task_code_comments_not_supported: Goal mode does not support code comments yet
workbench.plugins_hero_prompt: Summarize this week's project progress and create a visual report
workbench.plugins_marketplace_welcome_description: A marketplace can come from a GitHub repository or local marketplace.json file. Add one to search, install, and manage Codex-compatible plugins.
workbench.plugins_marketplace_config_description: Enter a GitHub repository or local marketplace.json file/folder.
workbench.plugins_marketplace_delete_description: This only removes the marketplace configuration. Installed plugins stay installed.
workbench.plugins_installed_mcps_description: Global installs enter the device install inventory and can be enabled or uninstalled.
workbench.plugins_mcp_providers_description: Configure a token, sync provider services, and install MCP servers by provider.
workbench.plugins_custom_mcp_description: Save a user-configured MCP and add it to the installed list.
workbench.plugins_custom_mcp_json_hint: Paste mcpServers or a single MCP server JSON.
workbench.plugins_skill_upload_description: Drop a skill package, review the details, then upload.
workbench.plugins_skill_upload_drop_title: Drop or choose a skill package
workbench.plugins_skill_upload_size_error: Skill package must be 10MB or smaller
workbench.plugins_plugin_upload_hint: Claude Code plugin ZIP, up to 50MB
workbench.plugins_plugin_upload_size_error: Plugin package must be 50MB or smaller
workbench.plugins_trial_missing_skill: This plugin has no skill available to try
workbench.plugins_create_prompt_title: What should we build in Wegent?
workbench.about_settings_subtitle: View Wework version and product information
workbench.about_settings_description: An AI workbench for office and coding workflows.
workbench.general_settings_subtitle: Manage Wework startup and background behavior
workbench.general_settings_language_description: Change the language used by Wework and the system tray menu.
workbench.general_settings_language_system_descrip: Choose automatically from your system language
workbench.general_settings_show_main_window_on_lau: When this is off, Wework starts in the system tray.
workbench.general_settings_close_to_tray: Keep running after closing the main window
workbench.general_settings_background_description: Closing the main window does not stop running tasks. Tasks continue in the background, and you can double-click the system tray icon to return to the main window.
workbench.general_settings_background_disabled_des: Closing the main window exits the app and interrupts running tasks.
workbench.general_settings_task_completion_notific: Send a system notification when a task completes
Send an operating system notification through the system notification plugin when a background task completes.
workbench.general_settings_tray_display_content_de: Choose which statuses appear in the tray icon and menu.
workbench.general_settings_tray_unread_description: Unread completed tasks show a green numeric reminder inside the tray icon.
workbench.general_settings_tray_running_descriptio: Running tasks show a vertical status bar between the icon and quota text.
workbench.general_settings_tray_usage_description: Show 5-hour and 7-day quota next to the tray icon.
workbench.context_settings_subtitle: Manage local context Wework injects into tasks
workbench.context_settings_terminal_injection_desc: When enabled, Wework includes recent Terminal output from the current workspace as application context when you send a message or guidance to Wework.
workbench.context_settings_wework_instructions_des: These instructions are written to Wework's local instruction config and affect new tasks.
workbench.context_settings_wework_instructions_hin: Save an empty value to clear Wework custom instructions.
workbench.context_settings_wework_instructions_loa: Failed to load Wework custom instructions
workbench.context_settings_wework_instructions_sav: Failed to save Wework custom instructions
workbench.keyboard_shortcuts_description: Manage local shortcuts on this device
workbench.keyboard_shortcuts_open_terminal_descrip: Show or hide the bottom panel
workbench.keyboard_shortcuts_toggle_side_panel_des: Show or hide the side panel
workbench.keyboard_shortcuts_toggle_model_selector: Open or close the model selector for the active composer
workbench.archived_chats_subtitle: Review, restore, or delete archived conversations
workbench.archived_chats_empty_desc: Archived conversations will appear here so you can restore or clean them up later.
workbench.archive_project_confirm: Archive all conversations in this project?
workbench.archive_project_dialog_desc: This will archive conversations in {{projectName}}. You can find them later in Archived conversations.
workbench.archive_all_dialog_desc: This will archive conversations in all projects. You can find them later in Archived conversations.
workbench.archive_projects_dialog_desc: This will archive conversations in Projects. You can find them later in Archived conversations.
workbench.archive_chats_dialog_desc: This will archive conversations in Chats. You can find them later in Archived conversations.
workbench.remove_project_dialog_desc: This will remove the project from Wework. Files on disk will not be deleted.
workbench.archived_conversations_desc: Manage archived Codex conversations stored on your devices.
workbench.archived_delete_dialog_desc: This will permanently delete the archived chat
workbench.archived_bulk_delete_dialog_desc: This will permanently delete all archived chats
workbench.archived_bulk_delete_background_progress: Deleting archived chats in the background: {{completed}} / {{total}}
workbench.archived_cleanup_partial_failed: Some files could not be cleaned: {{message}}
workbench.codex_plugin_config_description: Maintain WeWork's own Codex config.toml and control whether local plugins also load remote Apps / Connectors.
workbench.codex_plugin_remote_apps_description: When disabled, Codex will not fetch remote connector lists, and the $ menu only shows local plugins and skills.
workbench.codex_plugin_config_load_failed: Failed to load Codex plugin config
workbench.codex_plugin_config_save_failed: Failed to save Codex plugin config
workbench.codex_home_init_description: A native Codex directory was found, but WeWork does not have its own Codex config yet. You can copy existing Codex plugins, skills, and marketplace cache as the initial WeWork setup.
workbench.codex_home_init_remote_apps_description: When enabled, Codex can fetch available remote connectors; when disabled, only local plugins and skills are used.
workbench.appearance_subtitle: Adjust Wework theme, colors, and fonts
workbench.cloud_models_desc: Server models appear in the workbench model selector.
workbench.connection_scale_wiki_desc: When CPU, MEM, or disk stays above 80%, scale the cloud device plan or clean workspace cache.
workbench.model_settings_subtitle: Manage model endpoints and Codex settings.
workbench.model_interface_settings_description: Manage local endpoints and cloud models available to tasks.
workbench.local_model_request_url_empty: Enter the model base URL and request path; full URLs are split automatically
workbench.local_model_api_key_replace_placeholder: Leave blank to keep the saved key
workbench.local_model_context_window_hint: Used to show remaining context and handle long conversations. Leave blank to detect automatically.
workbench.local_model_web_search_hint: Keep this off when the model endpoint does not support it.
workbench.local_model_codex_features_hint: Enable only when the model endpoint supports them. Keep them off if unsure.
workbench.local_model_discard_changes_description: This form has unsaved content. Continuing will discard those changes.
workbench.local_model_cloud_device_blocked: Local endpoints can only run on a local device. Switch to a local device or choose a cloud model.
workbench.codex_settings_description: Manage this device's Codex auth and model configuration.
workbench.codex_personality_description: Controls how Codex communicates and shares progress. New chats and later messages use this setting.
workbench.codex_official_models_desc: Reads available models from the current device's Codex runtime.
workbench.codex_official_models_empty: No CodeX models are currently available.
workbench.local_codex_model_description: Reads this device's ~/.codex/auth.json and can be used as the sync source.
workbench.local_codex_auth_load_failed: Failed to read local Codex auth status
workbench.runtime_config_subtitle: Manage Codex settings used by cloud devices
workbench.runtime_config_codex_description: Sync CodeX auth information across devices.
workbench.runtime_config_cloud_sync_description: Choose one device as the source and sync its auth.json to other devices.
workbench.runtime_config_secret_stored: Auth information is encrypted; this page only shows status and digest.
workbench.runtime_config_upload_description: Choose local auth.json and save it on the server so cloud devices can use it.
workbench.runtime_config_device_description: Read auth.json from one online device and save it as cloud Codex auth.
workbench.cloud_models_disconnected_desc: Connect to cloud to view server-side models.
workbench.codex_auth_settings_description: Manage this device's Codex auth and model configuration.
workbench.runtime_config_invalid_json: auth.json must be a valid JSON object
workbench.runtime_config_proxy_description: When enabled, cloud Codex execution uses the cloud device proxy saved under Proxy.
workbench.runtime_config_proxy_not_configured: Save a proxy URL under Proxy first.
workbench.proxy_config_subtitle: Manage network proxies for this device and cloud devices separately
workbench.proxy_config_local_description: Set the network proxy for tasks running on this device. This setting stays local and does not sync to cloud.
workbench.proxy_config_local_clear_hint: Leave it empty and save to turn off the local device proxy.
workbench.proxy_config_local_save_success: Local device proxy saved. Restart Codex for new chats to use this proxy.
workbench.proxy_config_local_save_failed: Failed to save local device proxy
workbench.proxy_config_local_restart_success: Codex restarted. New chats will use this proxy.
workbench.proxy_config_local_restart_failed: Proxy saved, but Codex could not restart. Restart the app and try again.
workbench.proxy_config_description: Set the network proxy for tasks running on cloud devices. Local devices do not use this URL.
workbench.proxy_config_cloud_required_desc: Connect to cloud to configure the cloud device proxy. Local devices do not use this URL.
workbench.proxy_config_secret_stored: Proxy URLs are encrypted; this page only shows the masked value.
workbench.proxy_config_clear_hint: Leave it empty and save to turn off the cloud device proxy.
workbench.slash_command_plan_description: Ask clarifying questions before continuing when needed
workbench.slash_command_goal_description: Set a goal for WeWork to keep working toward
workbench.conversation_device_offline_notice: {{device}} is offline. You can continue when it is back online.
workbench.conversation_device_unavailable_notice: {{device}} is unavailable. You can continue when it is back online.
workbench.admin_password_setup_description: This installation has not configured the initial administrator password yet. Set it now to continue.
workbench.admin_username_description: Use this username with the password you set for future logins.
workbench.admin_password_setup_status_failed: Unable to confirm first-run setup status. Try again later.
